rationale: Educ. Code §29.082 governs optional extended year programs and student retention. It does not reference the homestead exemption amount or Tax Code §11.13(b). No operative conflict exists.
quote: A school district may set aside an amount from the district's allotment under Section 48.104 or may apply to the agency for funding of an extended year program
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal impact on school district allotments is possible but not addressed by this statute's operative text.
